summary: Created catalog integration for store-v2. Built src/lib/catalog.ts with loadCatalog(), getProduct(), getProductsByFilter() helpers and Product type. Updated StoreLanding.tsx and ProductDetail.tsx to read from catalog.json instead of hardcoded arrays. Verified build success and site loads correctly.
test_results: Build succeeded in 4.31s. Generated dist/index.html (0.46 kB), dist/assets/index-C70xitEW.js (241.28 kB), dist/assets/index-jbCrg4XQ.css (114.78 kB). curl http://localhost:58665/ returns HTML successfully. Product pages load at /product/pulse and /product/dynamic-survey-analyzer.
learnings: The catalog.json file already existed from previous work - used existing structure. tsconfig.json already had resolveJsonModule: true enabled, so no config change needed. The Product interface was moved from components to catalog.ts as the single source of truth.
